languages.text: Trazyn's stats are increased with each new body he posseses.

languages.text: Whenever Trazyn possesses a new body, he gains a bonus to his {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} until the end of combat.

languages.text: Chaque fois que Trazyn prend possession d'un nouveau corps, il gagne un bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text: Trazyn, yeni bir bedeni ele geçirdiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerine{/g} bonus kazanır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text: 特拉金附身新躯体后获得{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}加值，直到战斗结束。

languages.text: Siempre que Trazyn posee un nuevo cuerpo, recibe una bonificación a sus {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text: Ergreift Trazyn von einem neuen Körper Besitz, erhält er bis zum Ende des Kampfes einen Bonus auf seine {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g}.

languages.text: トラズンが新しい肉体を得るたびに、戦闘終了まで{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}特性{/g}にボーナスが付与される。
